PermitRootLogin.description: Root login via SSH must be disabled

Protocol.description: Only SSH Protocol 2 must be used

MaxAuthTries.description: Max authentication tries must be 4 or less

IgnoreRhosts.description: Rhosts-based authentication files must be ignored

PermitEmptyPasswords.description: Empty passwords must not be permitted

default_incoming_deny.description: Default incoming policy must be deny

dangerous_ports.description: Dangerous ports must not be open

root_locked.description: Root account password must be locked

no_nopasswd_sudo.description: No NOPASSWD entries in sudoers files
